title: Spicy Indian Fritters
description: Delicious Spicy Fritters with a crispy exterior, inspired by Indian cuisine. Serve as a snack or appetizer.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine Spicy Fritters Mix and 1/4 cup water. Mix well.
Heat Vegetable Oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
Using a spoon, drop small amounts of the Spicy Fritters Mix mixture into the hot oil.
Fry the fritters until crispy and golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the fritters from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the Spicy Fritters hot with a side of Tahini for dipping.
